title: Rich Spicy Russian Cheese Pilaf
description: A spicy, cheesy, and quick Russian dish featuring digestive biscuits and shio-cure, with anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the crushed digestive biscuits to the skillet and cook until lightly toasted.
In a large bowl, whisk together the shio-cure, turmeric, paprika, garlic powder, and onion powder.
Add the shredded cheddar cheese to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Add the milk to the bowl and stir until the cheese is well coated.
Add the cooked rice to the bowl and stir until the rice is well combined with the cheese mixture.
Add the toasted digestive biscuits to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes.
